tagline: Import BI workbooks (Beta): Add a Tableau or Power BI file to Genie Code and it builds an AI/BI dashboard that replicates your visualizations.
what_it_does: Import BI workbooks (Beta): Add a Tableau or Power BI file to Genie Code and it builds an AI/BI dashboard that replicates your visualizations. Open source fonts: Over 20 new open source fonts are now available as defaults. Parameter values in text widgets: Dashboard authors can now reference parameter values in text widgets.
why_it_matters: Answer now stops Genie from thinking and produces an immediate answer to the user question, at the cost of deeper analysis.

capabilities.desc: The Numeric datatype allows you to specify between Decimal and Integer. The default numeric type is Decimal. Allow multiple…
